title: poa badensis subsp. xerophila
intro: Poa badensis subsp. xerophila is a subspecies of the perennial meadow-grass Poa badensis, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Poa badensis subsp. xerophila include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Poa badensis subsp. xerophila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine.
